title: chrysanthemum macrotum
intro: Chrysanthemum macrotum, also known as large-flowered chrysanthemum or Hong Jiang, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum macrotum include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and improving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as having antioxidant and anti-aging effects. Chrysanthemum macrotum is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and can also be made into capsules, tablets, or dried flowers for consumption.
